name: Atlas Components Demo
expected: company profile should explain what the supplier does
website evidence should not be treated as certification verification
missing registry evidence should be visible

name: Nordic Bearings Demo
expected: adaptive search should try identity, products, quality, market profile, and external evidence
analysis should not default to Wikipedia
facts should stay draft until sources are confirmed

name: Yabang Trade
expected: search should look for marketplace and trade-directory profiles
analysis should compare similarly named suppliers
products should be extracted only when source text supports them

name: Kijani Industrial Supplies
expected: search should not depend on Wikipedia or European registries
country and industry fit should be part of identity confidence
missing certification evidence should remain explicit

name: Northstar Plastics
expected: certification hints should trigger a focused quality search
ISO 9001 should remain a claim unless a certificate or authority source confirms it
risk summary should separate company profile from certification gaps

name: Wrong Website Fixture
expected: analysis should avoid trusting unrelated generic website text
external search should try to recover supplier identity
evidence strength should remain sparse if no matching sources are found

name: Registry Number Fixture
expected: registry query should only run because an identifier was provided
registry evidence should be high confidence only when the source is reachable and supplier-specific
failed registry pages should not become validated facts

name: VAT Fixture
expected: tax identifier query should only run because VAT was provided
VAT evidence should be shown separately from product evidence
risk decision should stay draft if VAT cannot be verified

name: Fake Supplier Fixture
expected: analysis should say evidence is not confirmed when search fails
it should not invent AS9100 or ISO certifications
recommended next checks should ask for registry or certificate evidence

name: Duplicate Name Fixture
expected: analysis should compare similar company names
country and industry mismatch should lower confidence
source facts should not merge unrelated suppliers
